name: Ample Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ample Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd. produces and sells thick-film conductors in Taiwan. It offers pastes for terminal and internal electrodes of passive components, copper and silver paste products, and solar cells; and conductive silver pastes for touch panels, membrane switches, and LED and IC packages. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.
